professionalSummary.text: Senior Software Engineer with over 8 years of experience in frontend development and UI engineering, expert in React.js, React Native, and Next.js. Key achievements include increasing project delivery speed by 20% through API integration and enhancing user engagement by 20% with React UI dashboards.

responsibilities: Contributed to Panerai's global Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) platform serving multiple international markets.
Developed and maintained checkout, wishlist, mini-cart, product detail pages, and multi-currency experiences.
Implemented virtual try-on experiences, 3D product viewers, day/night product imagery, and cross-selling components.
Resolved UAE Dirham currency rendering issues across checkout, order summary, and order confirmation flows.
Worked across HTL components, Sling Models, clientlibs JavaScript, LESS styles, and Maven modules.

Translated complex Figma designs into pixel-perfect ES6 components (multilingual), used modern build tools and automated testing for clean, flawlessly rendered Sanity-fetched UIs, integrated third-party calendar.
Developed reusable React and React Native components ensuring consistency across web and mobile experiences.
Developed modular UI components, optimized SEO and load performance, and streamlined content workflows through Contentful and Storybook integration.
Architected and customized Sitecore templates with Vue.js and SCSS, ensuring scalable and reusable frontend modules for events and campaigns.

Integrated Mapbox for maps, customized React for discovery, improved accessibility through strong teamwork and problem-solving, consistently delivered clean code, and converted components of Vue to React components.
Rebuilt catalog and checkout flows with Next.js and GraphQL, optimized performance with Vercel deployments, and ensured responsive customer journeys.
Built an internal LMS platform for FE, BE, QA, and General training programs.
Implemented Google OAuth authentication with role-based access control.
Developed training calendar, video playback, Google Slides/PPT viewer, and calendar exports.
Built administration tools for content upload, user management, category filtering, and search.

experience.companyDescription: A software development company specializing in custom applications

responsibilities: Delivered secure and responsive banking modules with Angular and React, implemented dynamic forms, and integrated APIs for digital banking services.
Built responsive banking experiences across web and mobile platforms using React and React Native.
Implemented React UI dashboards enriched with GSAP animations, improving user engagement and cross-browser compatibility.
Designed responsive learning modules, integrated APIs, and implemented dynamic forms to improve student experience.
Increased international user engagement by 15% by building multilingual e-commerce UI with React and Material UI.
Extended learning experiences to mobile platforms using React Native and Expo.
Built reusable mobile UI components and integrated REST APIs for Android and iOS learning workflows.

education.institution: St. Kabir Convent Sr. Sec. School

keyAchievements.title: Academic and Professional Excellence
keyAchievements.description: Achieved top 10 percentile in university studies and consistently presented scalable solutions

projects.name: Aaloo
projects.description: Personal project — AI-powered food and social mobile platform built with React Native and Expo. Features meal logging with voice input, social feed, festival maps, leaderboard, rewards, OAuth, and offline sync.
projects.technologies: React Native, Expo, Expo Router, TypeScript, Fastify, Supabase, Prisma, FlashList, Reanimated, Google Maps

projects.name: InsideOut
projects.description: Hackathon project — Indoor navigation and wayfinding application using geolocation and location-aware experiences for interactive tours and VIP navigation.
projects.technologies: React Native, Expo, Google Maps, Geolocation

projects.name: GurukulX
projects.description: Personal project — Config-driven AI learning PWA with swipeable feed, 12-phase AI curriculum, progress tracking, notes, comments, and Supabase adapter pattern.

projects.name: Website Scraper & Rebuild Estimator
projects.description: Personal project — Website cloner using Puppeteer for dynamic scraping, CSS-complete analysis, asset bundling, and rebuild effort estimation. Used to analyze and estimate rebuilds for production sites.

projects.name: ESP32 AI Car
projects.description: Hackathon project — ESP32 and Raspberry Pi 4 autonomous car with Gemini AI voice control, servo steering, medical delivery sequence, obstacle sensors, and OTA firmware updates.
projects.technologies: ESP32, Raspberry Pi, Python, Flask, OpenCV, Gemini AI
